messages.content: We could discuss lower would just need to see how the statistics look and make sure it can continue to grow
What is your current team at?
How consistently have you been at the 50k mark and how are you funneling most fans? Through this IG? (edited)
How consistently have you been at the 50k mark and how are you funneling most fans? Through this IG!
Okay 50 a month we would be at around 35%. Are you a paid or free page?
What are you accustomed to percentage wise?

We tend to start most creators at 45% unless their revenue exceeds 30k a month. If itâs above 30k per month we
Drop this to 35%. Usually we come up with a target goal to then drop the commision again. However we provide in house editing for reels, oftv, YouTube, we provide leak takedowns, social media management, and a full chat team along with assigned chat managers and account managers. So we provide a lot of value!
I donât like calls sorry, what is your commission you take?

Hey! Love the content! I actually manage some of the top creators on OF and Telegram (mostly within the top 1% and some in the top .01%)! We specialize in 360 marketing and work with a select group of niche creators and other creators we know we can scale. What are you doing for marketing right now? We manage a bunch of platforms and have many systems in place for our creators, which most agencies donât do. This includes full chat team and managers, IG, Reddit, X, Telgram and we do OFTV creation and content houses every month or two. Would love to talk about you joining our team. You have a great page and I think we could scale you a lot. Plus we have a competitive commission scale. Let me know if you want to setup a phone call or group chat with my team to discuss what we can do! We have all female account management as well and our teams based between Palm Beach and LA! Let me know if you have any questions. Would love to talk more
